summary: Added configuration versioning and rate limiting features. Updated config.ts to handle semantic versioning and mcp-server.ts to implement request throttling.
details: Configuration versioning: Added applyConfigVersioning function to validate and migrate configuration versions. Rate limiting: Added checkRateLimit method to mcp-server.ts with configurable MAX_REQUESTS_PER_MINUTE (default: 10) and cleanup logic for old timestamps. Both features include proper validation and error handling.
